<!-- source-hash: 575b6410c58342e4d5015bf83ac91d00 -->
A paginated response DTO representing a list of devices returned from the OpenFrame API, including pagination metadata and filtered count.

## Key Components

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `devices` | `List<DeviceResponse>` | List of device records |
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo` | Pagination metadata (page number, size, etc.) |
| `filteredCount` | `Integer` | Total count of devices matching applied filters |

## Usage Example

```java
DevicesResponse response = DevicesResponse.builder()
    .devices(List.of(deviceResponse1, deviceResponse2))
    .pageInfo(PageInfo.builder()
        .page(0)
        .size(20)
        .totalPages(5)
        .build())
    .filteredCount(98)
    .build();

// Accessing fields
List<DeviceResponse> devices = response.getDevices();
PageInfo pagination = response.getPageInfo();
Integer total = response.getFilteredCount();
```

## Notes

- Annotated with `@Schema` for OpenAPI/Swagger documentation generation
- Uses Lombok (`@Data`, `@Builder`, `@NoArgsConstructor`, `@AllArgsConstructor`) to reduce boilerplate
- `filteredCount` reflects the total number of matching devices across all pages, useful for client-side pagination rendering
